# MarketplaceKitError.ageRatingExceptionNotNeeded

**Case**

An error that indicates the app requests an unnecessary age-rating exception.

## Declaration

```swift
case ageRatingExceptionNotNeeded
```

## Discussion

The framework throws this error if your app sets [doc://com.apple.MarketplaceKit/documentation/MarketplaceKit/InstallMetadata/requestAgeException] to `true` when it’s not needed — that is, when the app to install has an age rating that’s within the allowed range for the device (as determined by [doc://com.apple.MarketplaceKit/documentation/MarketplaceKit/AppLibrary/maximumAllowedAgeRating]).

## Age-rating errors

- **MarketplaceKitError.missingAgeRatingExceptionRequest**: An error that indicates the app needs to request an age-rating exception.
- **MarketplaceKitError.ratingRestricted**: An error that indicates the requested app’s age rating is beyond that allowed for the device.
